rationale: The pair shows strong topical alignment: the citing paper’s core model jointly estimates fairness with bounded rationality (QRE) in a manufacturer–retailer Stackelberg pricing game, while the cited paper is explicitly about bounded rationality/forward-looking behavior in manufacturer–retailer pricing with vertical Stackelberg vs Nash structures. Given this overlap in mechanism and channel-pricing setup, the citation could be serving as a substantive prior/theory benchmark rather than a generic mention, so it should be kept for full relation judgment.
